name: @mergevow/recorder
description: Guarded semantic action capture for MergeVow Contract V1.

scripts.build: pnpm clean && tsc -b tsconfig.build.json && tsup --config tsup.browser.config.ts --silent
scripts.clean: node -e "const { rmSync } = require('node:fs'); rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); rmSync('.tsbuildinfo', { force: true })"
